message:
test(oracle): add 9 conformance tests (200 total), note known gaps

New tests: complex WHERE predicates, group_concat custom separator,
multi-column IN, string functions misc, aggregate edge cases, CTAS,
boolean expressions, integer overflow arithmetic, correlated EXISTS.

Known gaps noted: row-value expressions (a,b) IN (...) not supported;
EXISTS subquery with GROUP BY + HAVING ignores aggregation in VDBE
inline scan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
